title: engine-cli 'prints a stable inspect summary' test flakes at 5000ms timeout
summary: Regression in old functionality. The engine CLI test 'prints a stable inspect summary' (tests/unit/engine-cli.test.ts) timed out on the first of three observed runs. The test is not in the S90 diff — it predates S90. Failure rate roughly 1-in-3 in local observation. Consistent pass on retry suggests the subprocess spawned by the test occasionally takes >5s to produce output. Companion regression-needed ticket: QA-2026-05-20-005.
repro: Observe on some runs: Error: Test timed out in 5000ms for 'engine CLI > prints a stable inspect summary'.
Re-run: the test passes. Observed 1 timeout in 3 consecutive runs.
expected: Test completes consistently within 5000ms across repeated runs.
actual: Occasionally times out (~33% of observed runs). Vitest default 5000ms deadline hit on the inspect subprocess call.
logs: Error: Test timed out in 5000ms. If this is a long-running test, pass a timeout value as the last argument or configure it globally with 'testTimeout'. at tests/unit/engine-cli.test.ts:54:3
